items.name: Priya Sharma
items.review: Swara made my wedding day absolutely magical. The bridal lehenga they crafted for me was beyond my imagination — every detail, every stitch was perfection. I received compliments throughout the day. Forever grateful!

items.name: Deepa Nair
items.review: I've been shopping at Swara for 3 years now and I can't imagine going anywhere else for ethnic wear. The quality is exceptional, the fabrics are luxurious, and the team is so helpful. My go-to store forever!

items.name: Kavya Patel
items.review: Bought the Garba Nite chaniya choli for Navratri and WOW! The mirror work, the quality, the flare of the skirt — absolutely divine. I danced all 9 nights comfortably. Everyone kept asking where I bought it from!

items.name: Ananya Mehta
items.review: The Indo-Western fusion set I ordered exceeded all expectations. The quality, stitching, and detailing are at par with high-end boutiques but at a fraction of the price. Swara is truly special!

items.name: Ritu Joshi
items.review: We ordered the entire bridal outfit set from Swara for my daughter's wedding. From the first consultation to the final delivery, everything was handled with such care and professionalism. Beautiful work!
